accepted_findings.issue: Protected student follow-up notes would be sent to a third-party model provider by default.
accepted_findings.evidence: guardian_owl:G-PRIV-001 cites attendance and follow-up notes sent to OpenRouter.
accepted_findings.impact: Protected data could leave the trusted boundary.

rejected_findings.explanation: This duplicates the accepted privacy finding.
